ToxPLTC.decision: already implemented before this audit: pooled ProtT5, fold-local 1:1 Borderline-SMOTE, TextCNN windows 4/5/6 and three-seed averaging; no duplicate training

HyPepTox-Fuse.dataset_relation: different balanced <=35-aa dataset: train 4414/4414 and independent 1104/1104 toxic/non-toxic
transferable_ideas: rank and select conventional peptide descriptors before PLM fusion
pairwise residue-level PLM cross-attention followed by Transformer fusion

validation_boundary.selection: fixed sequence-group five-fold OOF plus leave-one-group-fold-out fusion selection

baseline.model: three-seed pooled ProtT5 + fold-local Borderline-SMOTE + TextCNN

conventional_descriptor_expert.features: AAC, grouped AAC, DPC, CKSAAP gaps 1-4 and ASDC; 2428 dimensions
conventional_descriptor_expert.selection: top 887 ExtraTrees importances fitted independently inside each training fold
conventional_descriptor_expert.decision: rejected: descriptor information is predictive and slightly raises AUPRC in fusion, but lowers BACC, MCC and AUROC

esm2_prott5_feature_interaction.architecture: frozen aligned ESM2-650M and ProtT5 residue tokens, bidirectional cross-attention, four pooled modality/interaction tokens, one-layer Transformer CLS
esm2_prott5_feature_interaction.loss: class-weighted BCE plus 0.05 supervised NT-Xent at temperature 0.1
esm2_prott5_feature_interaction.decision: rejected: ranking improves slightly after fusion but decision metrics fall; prior standalone SupCon failure means no further contrastive-weight search

constrained_three_expert_fusion.constraint: descriptor and interaction weights each <=0.20; combined auxiliary weight <=0.30
constrained_three_expert_fusion.decision: rejected: AUPRC gain did not coexist with BACC/MCC improvement

final_decision.retain: this compact audit summary and README conclusions
final_decision.remove: temporary implementations, OOF prediction tables, PDF text extraction and rendered pages
final_decision.next_step: do not repeat these routes on the current development data; require a new pre-frozen external set before revisiting ranking-only auxiliaries
